name: tabs
description: Tab bar with underline, filled, and pill variants; scrollable mode; built-in panel with show-more body text

props.name: tabs
props.description: Array of tab definitions to render.

props.name: activeTab
props.description: The key of the currently active tab.

props.name: onTabChange
props.description: Callback fired when the user taps a different tab.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant of the tab bar.

props.name: scrollable
props.description: When true, the tab bar scrolls horizontally to accommodate many tabs.

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the tab bar container.

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Accessibility label for the tab list region.

props.name: textThreshold
props.description: Maximum character count before tab body text is truncated with a show-more toggle.

props.name: panelStyle
props.description: Style applied to the content panel area rendered below the tab bar.
